# meshstack_tenants (Data Source)

Query tenants in a workspace with optional filters.

~> **Preview:** This resource is in preview. Breaking changes are possible without prior notice due to changes in the underlying [meshStack preview API](https://docs.meshcloud.io/api/technical-specifications#preview-endpoints) or due to changes in this provider. Please ensure you are running the latest version of the provider and report any bugs via [GitHub issues](https://github.com/meshcloud/terraform-provider-meshstack/issues) or via support@meshcloud.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meshstack_tenants" "example" {
  workspace = "my-workspace"
  project   = "my-project"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace` (String) Workspace identifier. Required.

### Optional

- `landing_zone` (String) Landing zone identifier.
- `platform` (String) Full platform identifier (e.g. `aws.aws-meshstack-dev`).
- `platform_tenant_id` (String) Platform-specific tenant ID.
- `platform_type` (String) Platform type identifier (e.g. `AWS`).
- `project` (String) Project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `tenants` (Attributes Set) Set of matching tenants. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants))

<a id="nestedatt--tenants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants`

Read-Only:

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants--metadata))
- `ref` (Attributes) Reference to this tenant, can be used as `target_ref` in building block resources. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants--ref))
- `spec` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants--spec))
- `status` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants--status))

<a id="nestedatt--tenants--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants.metadata`

Read-Only:

- `created_on` (String)
- `deleted_on` (String)
- `marked_for_deletion_on` (String)
- `owned_by_project` (String)
- `owned_by_workspace` (String)
- `uuid` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--tenants--ref"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants.ref`

Read-Only:

- `kind` (String)
- `uuid` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--tenants--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants.spec`

Read-Only:

- `landing_zone_identifier` (String)
- `platform_identifier` (String)
- `platform_tenant_id` (String)
- `quotas` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants--spec--quotas))

<a id="nestedatt--tenants--spec--quotas"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants.spec.quotas`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (Number)



<a id="nestedatt--tenants--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants.status`

Read-Only:

- `platform_type_identifier` (String)
- `platform_workspace_identifier` (String)
- `tags` (Map of List of String)
- `tenant_name` (String)
